---
title: "01-diccionario"
author: "Soledad Araya"
date: "2026-04-22"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

Diccionario propio de palabras a eliminar (de tokens a data.frame):

```{r}
out <- convert(dfm(toks), to = "data.frame")

palabras <- out |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c(!doc_id), names_to = "tokens", values_to = "freq") |> 
  select(-doc_id) |> 
  group_by(tokens) |> 
  summarise(freq = sum(freq))

palabras <- palabras |> 
  filter(!tokens %in% stop_es)

palabras <- palabras |> 
  filter(freq >= 5)

rm(out)
```

Alimentar con diccionario anterior:

```{r}
diccionario <- readxl::read_xlsx("input/260421-diccionario.xlsx")

diccionario <- select(diccionario, tokens, eliminar, palabras_paises) 

dic_revision <- palabras |> 
  left_join(diccionario)

writexl::write_xlsx(dic_revision, "outputs/260427-palabras.xlsx")

rm(dic_revision)

# Quería revisar mujeres/genero
```
